saved_test.name: Relative Clauses with Whose and Which: V3 All Levels
saved_test.description: Page-local V3 package for Relative Clauses with Whose and Which with A1-C2 coverage.

theory_page.title: Relative Clauses with Whose and Which

questions.question: This is the writer {a1} article won the prize

a1.verb_hint: Use whose to show possession.

variants: This is the writer {a1} article won the prize

questions.question: I met a teacher {a1} students love science

a1.verb_hint: Whose is followed by a noun.

variants: I met a teacher {a1} students love science

questions.question: The woman {a1} car broke down called a taxi

a1.verb_hint: Use whose for a person who has something.

variants: The woman {a1} car broke down called a taxi

questions.question: The company {a1} offices moved abroad hired new staff

a1.verb_hint: Whose can be natural for organizations.

variants: The company {a1} offices moved abroad hired new staff

questions.question: The laptop {a1} I bought last year still works

a1.verb_hint: Use which for things.

variants: The laptop {a1} I bought last year still works

questions.question: The idea {a1} she suggested was practical

a1.verb_hint: Use which for an idea or proposal.

variants: The idea {a1} she suggested was practical

questions.question: He apologized immediately, {a1} impressed the manager

a1.verb_hint: Use which to refer to the whole previous clause.

variants: He apologized immediately, {a1} impressed the manager

questions.question: The train was late, {a1} made us miss the meeting

a1.verb_hint: A comma marks extra whole-clause information with which.

variants: The train was late, {a1} made us miss the meeting

questions.question: This is the rule {a1} applies to everyone

a1.verb_hint: Use which for a thing in this clause.

variants: This is the rule {a1} applies to everyone

questions.question: This is the actor {a1} name is hard to spell

a1.verb_hint: Choose the possessive relative word, not who is.

variants: This is the actor {a1} name is hard to spell

questions.question: I read a novel {a1} ending surprised me

a1.verb_hint: Replace the possessive phrase with whose.

variants: I read a novel {a1} ending surprised me

questions.question: The team fixed the error, {a1} saved the launch

a1.verb_hint: Use which after the comma for the whole previous fact.

variants: The team fixed the error, {a1} saved the launch
